summary: Backend testing for Smart File Scan & Dedup app: 30/30 tests passed (100%). All requested flows verified incl. JWT auth (signup/login/me), source endpoints (gdrive/dropbox invalid token rejection), file upload with sha256+text preview+is_generic_name, duplicate detection via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (real LLM call), AI rename suggestions, rename, delete, dashboard stats, and security (401 on protected endpoints without token). MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from all responses (verified). Deprecated 'shadow*' style props warning observed in Expo logs (frontend only, not in scope for backend testing but worth flagging).

minor.issue: External-token validation returns 400 wrapping the upstream error. Acceptable, but could be 401 for clarity when the upstream is Unauthorized.
Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') decorators. Should migrate to lifespan context manager.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo logs show repeated 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' warnings. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log

action_items: (Optional) Replace @app.on_event with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
(Frontend, future) Update RN styles: replace shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius with boxShadow per RN web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~800 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, files, sources, scan, dashboard) and a services layer (ai, drive, dropbox) for maintainability.

rename_file updates by {id} only without scoping to user_id in the $set call (the prior find_one already scopes by user_id, so safe in practice, but defense-in-depth would add user_id to the update filter).
dropbox_download_sample interpolates the path directly into the Dropbox-API-Arg header without JSON-escaping; a path containing a quote would break the header. Use json.dumps to build the arg.
seed_data_creation: Each run creates a fresh signup user test_<rand>@filescan.app and uploads 3 small text files; one duplicate is deleted at end of run. No persistent seed data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BASE_URL is read from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (frontend/.env). Note: there is no EXPO_BACKEND_URL key in frontend/.env, only EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Tests are idempotent (use random email). The AI tests do real Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and may take ~10-30s; pytest timeouts are set to 60-90s.
